info.title: Pandabase Store API
info.description: Programmatic API for merchant stores. Authenticate with a store token: `sk_` Bearer or `stk_` HMAC.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token mode — passes the secret directly. Token starts with `sk_`.

hmacAuth.name: Authorization
hmacAuth.description: HMAC mode — Authorization header carries the public token (`stk_...`). Each request must include an X-Pandabase-Signature header carrying an HMAC-SHA256 of the canonical request string.

items.title: Pro Plan
items.subtitle: Everything you need to ship
items.description: Full access to the platform — unlimited stores, no transaction caps.
